title: Knight trap with e5
description: The key tactical motif: 4.e5 attacks the Nf6, forcing it to retreat to g8 and losing tempo.

title: Queen centralization
description: Qe2 followed by Qxe5+ puts the queen on a dominant central square with check.

title: Light-square bishop exchange
description: The Bf5-g6-h7-d3 maneuver exchanges the potentially bad bishop for White's good bishop.

title: Pawn structure solidity
description: The c6-e6 structure with no weaknesses gives Black a reliable, draw-rich position.
